title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama’s REST API; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; works in Node, Deno, Bun and modern browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLMs or embedders inside LangChain pipelines.

title: llama-index-integrations-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding drivers for Ollama, enabling local RAG stacks.

title: Ollama WebUI
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (self-hosted, Docker-ready) resembling ChatGPT interface.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI chat client for Ollama with conversation history and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style code-completion service for VS Code.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU and persistence options.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images (CPU & CUDA) published to Docker Hub for quick local or server deployment.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library for Ollama supporting Kotlin, Scala, and Android apps.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem providing idiomatic access to the Ollama REST API with ActiveModel flavor.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: chainlit-ollama
summary: Template repo showing how to build a Chainlit chat UI backed by any Ollama model in 10 lines.

title: ollama-codellama-vscode
summary: VS Code extension that connects to Ollama Codellama for inline code explanation and generation.

title: ollama-grpc
summary: Thin gRPC service wrapper around Ollama HTTP API for high-performance cross-language inference.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Lightweight React chatbot component that talks to your local Ollama instance over fetch.

title: ollama-model-hub
summary: Community-curated list of GGUF models tested with Ollama, including download stats and GPU RAM notes.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an AI sidebar powered by any Ollama model for note summarization and Q&A.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that brings Ollama models into your server with slash commands and threads.
